summary: Willow 1.0.14 fixes the omnibox suggestion hover rendering on scaled laptops and tightens the top-bar visuals.
changes: Switches the address suggestions popup off the transparent layered rendering path so hovered suggestions stay sharper on display-scaled laptops.
Removes the extra gap styling between suggestion rows that could show dark separator bands while moving through results.
Stops scaling the security button glyph on hover so the icon in the address bar no longer blurs.
Keeps the omnibox and suggestion dropdown aligned as a single attached control.
Refreshes the published build and update feed with the hover-rendering fix.
